title: [Feature] Dynamic Gateway Header Injection
body: Allow administrators to dynamically inject custom HTTP headers (such as CORS headers or API keys) into client extension traffic directly from the gateway portal.

issues.title: Backend: Apply Custom Headers in Proxy
issues.body: Modify `pkg/server/proxy.go` to inject `lease.AddedHeaders` into the HTTP request before forwarding it down the tunnel.

issues.title: Backend: Custom Headers API Endpoint
issues.body: Create a new secure endpoint (`POST /api/portal/reservations/headers`) in `pkg/server/api_service_reservation.go` to allow users to update the `AddedHeaders` map for a specific active subdomain lease.

issues.title: Frontend: Portal UI Headers Configuration
issues.body: Enhance the Gateway Dashboard UI (`pkg/server/static/dashboard.html` and `dashboard.js`) to include a 'Custom Headers' section within the Tunnel Details modal, allowing dynamic addition and removal of headers.

issues.title: Frontend: Expose Public URLs in Inspector UI and API
issues.body: Update `pkg/client/inspector.go` to include `public_urls` in `/api/info` and display them in a new sidebar panel in `inspector.html`.
